title: Create:Otherworld
description: The Create mod and Confluence: otherworld
body:
Modpack with create and Confluence: Otherworld integration. This modpack will eventually inclue full compatibility from create and Confluence: Otherworld. This modpack is currently in early development.

Currnenlty this has basic create recipies for various things from Confluence:otherworld

The plan is to have everything fully automateable (ores/potions/blocks/items)
currently potions and ores are automated. Create mod zinc isn't yet
